log_mmap_config(3) Library Functions Manual log_mmap_config(3)

NAME

log_mmap_config - Configuration for mmap logging.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/log/mmap.h>

Data Fields


const char * log_path
size_t max_size

Detailed Description

Configuration for mmap logging.

Definition at line 51 of file log/mmap.h.

Field Documentation

const char* log_mmap_config::log_path

Path to log file (required)

Definition at line 52 of file log/mmap.h.

Referenced by log_mmap_init().

size_t log_mmap_config::max_size

Maximum file size (0 = default 4MB)

Definition at line 53 of file log/mmap.h.

Referenced by log_mmap_init().
